content:
2. Should the professor have a one-time “Judgment Roll” per semester?

✔ A Judgment Roll could be used once per semester to override or alter a major event.
✔ This would be used as a reset or intervention mechanism.

3. Should students be able to use XP to “buy” knowledge of secret rolls?

✔ Example: A player could spend XP to gain hidden insights into the professor’s secret rolls.
✔ If yes, should it only be available to certain archetypes, or should any player be allowed to do this?

🚀 Version 7.1 now finalizes archetype-specific roles, professor’s secret operations, student-led leader selection, and item-based curse transfers.
🔥 Are we fully locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Plan for Exhaustively Documenting & Organizing Everything (Version 7.2)


🚀 Goal: To efficiently and effectively present all finalized content from our iterations while ensuring clarity, organization, and usability for both the instructor (you) and the students.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 411 (chunk 411/555)
